HowItWorks.heading: It's Simple To Start
HowItWorks.subheading: 3 steps to start investing on Bullex — from free account to your first purchase.

register.title: Register
register.description: Create a free Bullex account in seconds, using only your email.

explore.title: Explore the platform
explore.description: Explore the platform and see our investment options.

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.description: Start investing with a minimum deposit of just $200.

FAQ.heading: Common <highlight>Questions</highlight>
FAQ.subheading: Everything you need to know about investing with Bullex.
FAQ.stillHaveQuestions: Still have questions? We're here to help.

experience.question: Do I need any investing experience to get started?
experience.answer: No. Bullex is built for both beginners and experienced investors. You can start with a small amount, try the demo account first, and go at your own pace.

guarantee.question: Are returns guaranteed?
guarantee.answer: No. Investing in cryptocurrency involves risk, including the possible loss of your invested capital. Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results — never invest money you can't afford to lose.

minAmount.question: How much do I need to start investing?
minAmount.answer: Opening an account is free, and you can start investing with as little as $200.

assets.question: What assets can I invest in?
assets.answer: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and 50+ other cryptocurrencies, with more added regularly.

security.question: How is my crypto secured?
security.answer: Client funds are held in segregated wallets, with the majority kept in offline cold storage. We never share your private keys.

depositsWithdrawals.question: How do deposits and withdrawals work?
depositsWithdrawals.answer: Deposit any supported cryptocurrency directly to your Bullex wallet. Withdrawals are typically processed within a few hours once identity verification is complete.

mobile.question: Can I access my portfolio on mobile?
mobile.answer: Yes — Bullex works in any mobile browser.

Advantages.heading: Why investors choose Bullex
Advantages.subheading: Straightforward tools, transparent pricing, and a platform built for long-term investing.

interface.title: Easy-to-use interface
interface.description: Have all resources at your fingertips, with an interface that combines simplicity and clarity.

marketData.title: Real-time market data
marketData.description: Live prices and portfolio tracking, updated in real time, so you always know where you stand.

fees.title: Transparent fees
fees.description: No hidden fees or minimum balance requirements — see exactly what you pay before you invest.

deposits.title: Deposits & withdrawals
deposits.description: Deposit any supported cryptocurrency, and withdraw with processing typically completed within hours.

recurring.title: Recurring investments
recurring.description: Automate your investing with scheduled recurring buys — dollar-cost average without lifting a finger.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.description: Our trained support team is ready to help you at any moment.

Assets.heading: What you can invest in
Assets.description: We offer a wide range of cryptocurrencies and other digital assets for you to invest in. Start building your portfolio today and take advantage of the growing crypto market.
